title: COSIGN Entry v1
description: One line of COSIGN_CHAIN.ndjson. Rolling-chain hash scheme: prev_sha[i] = sha256(lines[0..i-1].join('\n') + '\n'). seq=1 is genesis (prev_sha=null). Schema derived from observation of 21 entries in liris:9999/cosign-chain.ndjson 2026-04-18.

seq.description: Monotonic sequence number. seq=1 is genesis. Every append increments by exactly 1.

ts.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp of when the entry was appended.

event.description: Canonical event name. Examples: COSIGN-GENESIS-ENVELOPE-V1, COSIGN-A-008-ACER-LEGACY-INVENTORY, COSIGN-SECTION-A-CLOSED-ACER.

operator_witness.description: Who witnessed this entry. Typical: 'jesse+rayssa' or 'jesse+rayssa (week-override expires <ts>)'.

oneOf.description: Rolling-chain sha256: sha256(all prior lines joined with \n + trailing \n). Tampering with any prior seq breaks every subsequent prev_sha, making per-entry forgery infeasible without rewriting the entire tail.

glyph_sentence.description: Canonical glyph sentence summarizing the entry. Ends with @ M-<MOOD> . where MOOD ∈ {INDICATIVE, EYEWITNESS, SUBJUNCTIVE, ...}.

node.description: Optional. Which DEV-* node produced the underlying work (e.g. DEV-ACER, DEV-LIRIS). Present in 19/21 observed entries.

artifacts.description: Optional. Map of logical-name → {path, sha256, bytes?, pass?, fail?, checks_green?, checks_total?, ...}. Pins exact file versions referenced by this entry. Present in 19/21 observed entries.

acer_commit.description: Optional. Acer-side git commit hash if this entry corresponds to acer-produced work. Present in 8/21 observed entries.

smp_items_closed.description: Optional. SMP-V5 item IDs closed by this entry (e.g. ['A-008'], ['H-038','H-046']).

smp_items_unblocked_next.description: Optional. SMP items that become actionable after this entry.

promotions.description: Optional. D11 level promotions recorded by this entry.

eta_was.description: Original ETA when the item was claimed.

section_A_arc.description: Optional. Section A 7-commit arc summary object.

$comment: additionalProperties=true — the cosign format is intentionally append-extensible. New custom fields can be added per-event without breaking existing validators. If you add a new field that becomes common (appears in ≥5 entries), propose it for the 'well-known' list above.
